name: adamsreview
description: Parallel Codex code review workflow with persistent artifacts, PR bot-comment enrichment, walkthrough, promote, and fix modes.

interface.shortDescription: Parallel Codex review and fix workflow
interface.longDescription: Runs multi-lens Codex code reviews with persistent artifacts, default GitHub PR bot-comment enrichment, batched validation, walkthrough/promote flows, and parallel fix-group workers.
defaultPrompt: Use $adamsreview to review this PR in parallel.
Use $adamsreview to fix eligible review findings.
Use $adamsreview to walk through skipped findings.
